title: Create Redstone craft
description: An Addon create to craft redstone
body:
An Addon create to craft redstone with the mechanical mixing.

Are you tired of constantly going back down into the mines to get redstone?

The Create mod requires large amounts of redstone, and that can get tedious. This mod is for you ! You can now craft redstone and save yourself some precious time.

**Feature :**
- Use a mixer
- Add crushed netherack
- Add some iron nuggets
- You get redstone

![Redstone craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3116888e81cca68345d4893bb352283a0c0b1ebc.gif)

**If you want a specific version of this mod, don't esitate to ask me in comment section !**
